_comment: Per-game hang-tab flap tuning, applied by measure-flaps.js. cornerR = rounding of the tab's free (top) corners (fraction of min(width,flapHeight)). hole = the die-cut hang-hole: a rounded-rectangle (stadium) slot x1,y1,x2,y2 + a circle {ccx,ccy,cr} centred on top, all normalised to the flap texture (y measured downward). rr optional (corner-radius fraction, default 1 = full stadium).
